problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
